response:
Subject: Request to Unblock Account – Suspicious Payments Issue  

Dear Google Support,  

I am writing to appeal the recent account block. My account was temporarily suspended due to suspicious payments that I did not make. I believe the action was unjustified and would like to request a review of my case.  

I have provided the following information to clarify the situation:  
- My account details (removed for privacy)  
- Payment history (removed for privacy)  
- Evidence of legitimate transactions (removed for privacy)  

I am committed to complying with Google’s policies and hope for a prompt resolution. Please review my case and consider unblocking my account.  

Thank you for your attention.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
